rules.title: Texas Business & Commerce Code Chapter 509 - Use of Digital Services by Minors
rules.scope_note: Applies only within the scope of Texas law; not nationwide federal law. Current enforceability may be affected by litigation or injunctions and must be checked before legal use.
rules.status_note: Official Texas Constitution and Statutes codified source. On 2026-05-24, the official Texas statutes and legislature sites returned HTTP 503 maintenance responses with Retry-After Tue, 26 May 2026 12:00:00 GMT, so this entry remains a source stub until the official source is available.
